releases.title: Baseline & Multiplayer Fixes
notes: 🎾 Baseline: fixed the trophy ceremony where players' caps overlapped their faces.
🌐 Baseline online: the ball no longer disappears at your opponent's end — added opponent hit animations and smoother, predictive paddle movement for cleaner rallies.
🔍 Online: stale and abandoned rooms now clear out of the room browser, so you only see matches you can actually join.
⚔️ Black Knight: fixed downloading for players who installed it before the new update system — your copy now refreshes to the latest version automatically.

releases.title: Baseline, Feedback & Polish
notes: 🆕 New game: Baseline — serve, rally, and outlast your opponent in this tennis arcade experience.
💬 Added a Feedback button so you can send notes and bug reports without leaving the launcher.
🔗 Added a Share button to show off your favorite games.
⚡ Big performance improvements to the launcher — faster load times and smoother navigation.
🙏 Added credits for third-party developers whose work powers several games.
🎨 Refreshed cover art for Rhino Pileup, Floe Fighters, and Coldmere.
🐛 Fixed a Void Assault softlock that could freeze your run if you had unlocked every upgrade.

releases.title: Black Knight Updates
notes: 💾 Black Knight: your run now saves automatically — close the game any time and pick up right where you left off with the new "Continue Run" button.
📖 Black Knight: the Bestiary now reveals each foe only after you've faced it, so there's something to uncover as you descend.
🎨 Black Knight: fresh cover art.
✅ Black Knight is out of work-in-progress and ready to play.
🌐 Fixed online multiplayer lobby search so open rooms show up reliably when browsing.
🐛 Squashed assorted bugs across several games for smoother, more stable play.

releases.title: Three New Games & Better Multiplayer
notes: 🎲 New game: Settlers — build, trade, and settle your way to victory with up to 6 players online.
🦆 New game: Cup of Duck — a four-level platformer where a determined mallard climbs, double-jumps, and glides toward a refreshing cup of berry water.
🧊 New game: Floe Fighters — fast-paced online multiplayer action on the ice.
🌐 Improved online multiplayer: smoother lobbies and solid support for games with 3 or more players.
✨ Various visual polish across the launcher.

releases.title: What's New & a Tidier Launcher
notes: ✨ Added a "What's New" button to the top bar so you can read release notes right in the launcher.
📜 What's New now opens to the latest update, with a "See all patch notes" button to browse the full history.
🔔 A gold dot appears on the button whenever a new update has notes you haven't seen yet.
🧹 Updates are now leaner — builds no longer include dev, test, or backup files, or personal save data.

releases.title: Pickle Arcade Launch
notes: 🎮 First public release of Pickle Arcade.
🕹️ Full game library with covers, stats, and achievements.
🏆 Player profiles, favorites, and a recently-played row.
🔄 Auto-updates: the launcher now checks for new versions on startup.
